goals.short_name: British Columbians are protected by effective policing and community safety programs

main_services.name: Access policing services in your community
Get a criminal record check for work with children or vulnerable adults

goals.short_name: People affected by crime get support, and offenders are safely supervised

main_services.name: Get support as a victim of crime
Serve or manage a custodial or community sentence

goals.short_name: Unlawful proceeds are seized and unexplained deaths are independently investigated

main_services.name: Report and recover proceeds of unlawful activity
Get information about a death investigated by the coroner

goals.short_name: Roads are safer and fire risks are managed through licensing, standards and enforcement

main_services.name: Keep your driver's licence and driving privileges in good standing

acts.summary: Governs the structure, funding and standards of police services in B.C., municipal police boards, auxiliary constables, and the province-wide Protection Order Registry. Citation confirmed via a live link on the fetched 'Structure of police services in B.C.' page.

sections.title: Provision and structure of police services
sections.description: Sets out municipal, provincial, First Nations and integrated policing arrangements and the Police Tax financing model for small communities.

services.name: Find your local police service
services.ms_name: Access policing services in your community

sections.title: Municipal police boards
sections.description: Requires municipalities with independent police departments to be governed by a municipal police board.

services.name: Serve on a municipal police board
services.ms_name: Access policing services in your community

sections.title: Auxiliary constables
sections.description: Provides for the appointment and supervision of volunteer auxiliary constables who support police operations.

services.name: Volunteer with police through the Auxiliary Program
services.ms_name: Access policing services in your community

sections.title: Protection Order Registry
sections.description: Authorizes the confidential, province-wide registry of civil and criminal protection orders used by police to confirm and enforce orders.

services.name: Search or register a protection order
services.ms_name: Get support as a victim of crime

acts.summary: Regulates the licensing of security workers and security businesses in B.C. and replaced the security provisions of the former Private Investigators and Security Agencies Act (RSBC 1996, c 374). Citation confirmed via CanLII and the BC Laws consolidation link.

sections.title: Security worker licensing
sections.description: Requires a licence to work as a security guard, private investigator, locksmith, alarm installer, security consultant, armoured car guard or body armour salesperson.

services.name: Get a security worker licence
services.ms_name: Get a security industry licence

sections.title: Security business licensing
sections.description: Requires a licence to operate a business that provides security services.

services.name: Get a security business licence
services.ms_name: Get a security industry licence

sections.title: Compliance and enforcement
sections.description: Gives the registrar powers to investigate complaints and take enforcement action against licensed security workers and businesses.

services.name: Report a concern about a security worker or business
services.ms_name: Get a security industry licence

sections.title: Armoured vehicle and body armour permits
sections.description: Requires permits to operate an armoured vehicle or possess body armour in B.C.

services.name: Get permits for armoured vehicles or body armour
services.ms_name: Get a security industry licence

acts.summary: Requires designated organizations to screen employees and volunteers who work with children or vulnerable adults through the Criminal Records Review Program. Citation confirmed via a live link on the fetched 'Law and policy: Criminal Records Review Program' page.

sections.title: Vulnerable sector criminal record checks
sections.description: Establishes the vulnerable sector check process administered by the Criminal Records Review Program.

services.name: Get a criminal record check through the Criminal Records Review Program
services.ms_name: Get a criminal record check for work with children or vulnerable adults

sections.title: Organization screening duties
sections.description: Requires designated organizations to ensure their employees and volunteers are screened under the Act.

services.name: Screen employees and volunteers as an organization
services.ms_name: Get a criminal record check for work with children or vulnerable adults

acts.summary: Establishes victim services, victim notification and support programs for people affected by crime in B.C. Citation identified via BC Laws search results; not independently fetched from the consolidation site.

sections.title: Victim services
sections.description: Authorizes funding and coordination of victim service programs including VictimLinkBC.

services.name: Get 24/7 crisis support and referrals as a victim of crime
services.ms_name: Get support as a victim of crime

sections.title: Victim notification
sections.description: Establishes the Victim Safety Unit and victim notification program for registered victims.

services.name: Register for notification about an offender's status
services.ms_name: Get support as a victim of crime

acts.summary: Governs the Crime Victim Assistance Program, which provides medical, counselling, income-support and other benefits to victims, family members and witnesses affected by violent crime. January 2024 amendments expanded eligibility and benefit rates. Citation confirmed via the BC Laws link cited directly on the fetched Crime Victim Assistance Program page.

sections.title: Benefits for victims, family members and witnesses
sections.description: Sets out eligibility and benefit categories for victims, immediate family members and witnesses of violent crime.

services.name: Apply for crime victim assistance benefits
services.ms_name: Get support as a victim of crime

acts.summary: Governs BC Corrections' management of adults in custody and under community supervision, and correctional programming. Replaced the former Correction Act, RSBC 1996, c 74. Citation confirmed via CanLII and the BC Laws consolidation link.

sections.title: Custody and community supervision
sections.description: Authorizes correctional centres, probation supervision, and conditions for community sentences such as bail and probation orders.

services.name: Find a correctional centre or probation office
services.ms_name: Serve or manage a custodial or community sentence

sections.title: Correctional programs
sections.description: Authorizes rehabilitative programming addressing substance use, violence prevention and life skills for people in custody or under supervision.

services.name: Access programs to reduce reoffending while in custody or on probation
services.ms_name: Serve or manage a custodial or community sentence

acts.citation: RSBC 2024, c 1 (consolidated from SBC 2005, c 29, effective June 17, 2024)
acts.summary: Authorizes the Director of Civil Forfeiture to forfeit to the Province property that is the proceeds or an instrument of unlawful activity, and to disburse forfeited funds to crime-prevention grants and victim compensation. Citation confirmed via CanLII and the BC Laws consolidation link.

sections.title: Forfeiture of unlawfully obtained property
sections.description: Establishes the civil forfeiture process targeting proceeds and instruments of unlawful activity.

services.name: Report suspected proceeds or instruments of unlawful activity
services.ms_name: Report and recover proceeds of unlawful activity

sections.title: Disbursement of forfeited funds
sections.description: Authorizes the Director to fund crime-prevention grants and compensate eligible victims of unlawful activity from forfeited funds.

services.name: Apply for a crime-prevention grant or victim compensation from forfeited funds
services.ms_name: Report and recover proceeds of unlawful activity

acts.summary: Governs the BC Coroners Service's independent investigation of unnatural, sudden, unexpected, unexplained or unattended deaths, and the coroner's inquest process. Replaced RSBC 1996, c 72. Citation confirmed via a live link on the fetched BC Coroners Service page.

sections.title: Duty to report and investigate reportable deaths
sections.description: Sets out which deaths are reportable to the Coroners Service and the coroner's duty to investigate.

services.name: Report a death to the BC Coroners Service
services.ms_name: Get information about a death investigated by the coroner

sections.title: Coroner's reports and inquests
sections.description: Governs coroner's investigation reports and public inquests, including death review panels.

services.name: Request a coroner's report or family resources
services.ms_name: Get information about a death investigated by the coroner

acts.summary: Governs driver licensing, medical fitness, driving prohibitions, suspensions and vehicle impoundment in B.C., administered by RoadSafetyBC and the Superintendent of Motor Vehicles. Citation confirmed via a live link on the fetched RoadSafetyBC prohibitions page.

sections.title: Driver medical fitness and Superintendent of Motor Vehicles
sections.description: Authorizes the Superintendent of Motor Vehicles to assess driver medical fitness and make licensing decisions.

services.name: Get your driver's medical fitness assessed
services.ms_name: Keep your driver's licence and driving privileges in good standing

sections.title: Driving prohibitions and reviews
sections.description: Authorizes alcohol- and drug-related driving prohibitions and suspensions and the process to apply for a review.

services.name: Apply for a review of a driving prohibition or suspension
services.ms_name: Keep your driver's licence and driving privileges in good standing

sections.title: Vehicle impoundment
sections.description: Authorizes impoundment of vehicles driven by high-risk offenders and the process to recover an impounded vehicle.

services.name: Get your vehicle back after an impoundment
services.ms_name: Keep your driver's licence and driving privileges in good standing

sections.title: High-risk driver programs
sections.description: Authorizes driver improvement, ignition interlock and responsible driver programs for high-risk drivers.

services.name: Complete a high-risk driver program
services.ms_name: Keep your driver's licence and driving privileges in good standing

acts.summary: Gives police new civil powers, including firearm violence prevention orders, to remove firearms from situations of risk. Citation confirmed via CanLII and the BC Laws consolidation link.

sections.title: Firearm violence prevention orders
sections.description: Authorizes courts to make firearm violence prevention orders restricting a person's access to firearms.

services.name: Prevent and respond to firearm and gang violence
services.ms_name: Access policing services in your community

acts.citation: SBC 2016, c 19 (in force August 1, 2024, replacing the Fire Services Act, RSBC 1996, c 144)
acts.summary: Governs fire safety standards, enforcement, incident reporting and training requirements for firefighters, fire inspectors and investigators, administered by the Office of the Fire Commissioner. Citation and in-force date confirmed via BC Laws and a 2024 government news release.

sections.title: Mandatory fire incident reporting
sections.description: Requires designated parties to report specific fire incidents to the Office of the Fire Commissioner.

services.name: Report a fire incident
services.ms_name: Comply with fire safety standards

sections.title: Training standards for fire service personnel
sections.description: Authorizes the Fire Commissioner to establish minimum training standards for firefighters, fire inspectors and investigators.

services.name: Get trained and certified as a firefighter, fire inspector or investigator
services.ms_name: Comply with fire safety standards
